description: Retries fire in tight loops or synchronized waves with no backoff, amplifying a transient failure into an outage.
body: Failure mode: on dependency failure the code retries immediately or at a fixed interval across all clients, so a recovering service is re-overwhelmed and never stabilizes. Detection signals: retry loop with no sleep or fixed sleep; no jitter; no attempt cap; traffic spikes to a failing dependency. Do not retry without capped exponential backoff and full jitter. Safer fallback: add full jitter, cap attempts and total deadline, and add a circuit breaker that stops retrying under sustained failure.
